_**User (2026-04-03 13:17:05Z)**_

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - User is in Phase 8 (Iterative Buildout) of the Inventorize project, implementing features in batches
   - Batch 1 was completed in a prior session: barcode/QR scanning, CSV export, dashboard charts, low stock alerts
   - Batch 2 was confirmed and implemented in this session: (1) Supplier create/edit form, (2) Stock adjustment form with barcode scanner and reason enum, (3) Audit log filtering by entity type and date range
   - User said "im ready" to hear Batch 3 proposal — assistant proposed product create/edit, user CRUD, and purchase order create/detail
   - User's most recent request: "Update governance docs for all changes just made" — update CHANGELOG_AI.md and IMPLEMENTATION_MAP.md for Batch 2 work
   - User prefers Claude Code over Cline for all phases (saved in memory)

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Inventorize: multi-tenant SaaS inventory management app
   - Next.js 15 App Router with tRPC for API
   - Prisma ORM with tenant-scoped queries via `withTenantContext`
   - Auth.js v5 with JWT strategy
   - html5-qrcode for browser-based barcode/QR scanning (BarcodeScanner component)
   - recharts for dashboard visualizations
   - RBAC via `requireRole()` middleware on tRPC procedures
   - `exactOptionalPropertyTypes: true` in tsconfig — strict optional handling
   - Stock adjustment uses reason enum: `recount | damage | theft | correction | other`
   - Audit log router supports filters: entityType, entityId, actorUserId, startDate, endDate
   - App runs on port 3000 via standalone server
   - All tenant-scoped data uses `tenantId` with RLS enforcement
   - Spec-Driven Platform V26 governance with CLAUDE.md, CHANGELOG_AI.md, IMPLEMENTATION_MAP.md

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/supplier.router.ts`** (READ — for input schema reference)
     - create: name (required), contactPerson, phone, email, address, notes (all nullable)
     - update: id + all fields optional, plus isActive toggle
     - Requires ADMIN or PURCHASING_STAFF role

   - **`apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/stock-adjustment.router.ts`** (READ — for input schema reference)
     - create: adjustmentDate (datetime), reason (enum: recount/damage/theft/correction/other), notes, items: [{productId, quantityDelta}]
     - Validates stock won't go negative, applies changes atomically in transaction
     - Requires ADMIN role
     - List includes createdByUser/approvedByUser/items with product names

   - **`apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/audit-log.router.ts`** (READ — for input schema reference)
     - list: paginated, ADMIN only, filters: entityType (string), entityId (string), actorUserId (cuid), startDate/endDate (datetime)
     - Includes actorUser name and email

   - **`apps/web/src/app/[tenantSlug]/suppliers/page.tsx`** (REWRITTEN — Batch 2 Feature 1)
     - Added create form with fields: name*, contactPerson, phone, email, address, notes
     - Edit button per row that pre-fills form with supplier data via `startEdit()`
     - Activate/Deactivate toggle button per row via `toggleActive()`
     - Form handles both create and edit mode based on `editingId` state
     - Uses `trpc.supplier.create.useMutation` and `trpc.supplier.update.useMutation`
     - Nullable fields sent as null when empty string
     - Full code written to file (see file contents)

   - **`apps/web/src/app/[tenantSlug]/adjustments/page.tsx`** (REWRITTEN — Batch 2 Feature 2)
     - Create form with reason dropdown (recount/damage/theft/correction/other)
     - BarcodeScanner component for product search (reuses pattern from stock-in/stock-out)
     - PendingItems state with quantityDelta (can be positive or negative)
     - Real-time result preview showing currentQuantity + delta = result
     - Flags negative stock in red with "(negative!)" warning
     - Only submits items where quantityDelta !== 0
     - List table enhanced: reason badges color-coded, items shown inline, user names resolved
     - Uses `trpc.stockAdjustment.create.useMutation`

   - **`apps/web/src/app/[tenantSlug]/audit-logs/page.tsx`** (REWRITTEN — Batch 2 Feature 3)
     - Filter bar with: entity type dropdown (Product/Supplier/StockIn/StockOut/StockAdjustment/User/Tenant), start date, end date
     - Clear filters button when any filter is active
     - Entry count display with "(filtered)" indicator
     - Pagination controls (Prev/Next with page X of Y)
     - Action type badges color-coded: CREATE=green, UPDATE=blue, DELETE=red
     - Entity type and entity ID split into separate columns
     - Actor shows name + email
     - End date uses T23:59:59 to include the full day

   - **`apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/product.router.ts`** (READ — for Batch 3 proposal)
     - create: productCode, barcodeValue, name, category, unit, supplierCost, markupPercent, lowStockThreshold, serialTrackingEnabled
     - update: all fields optional, recalculates sellingPrice if cost/markup changes
     - Requires ADMIN role for create/update

   - **`apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/user.router.ts`** (READ — for Batch 3 proposal)
     - create: name, email, password, role (admin/warehouse_staff/purchasing_staff) — bcrypt hashing
     - update: name, email, role, isActive — prevents self-deactivation
     - resetPassword: id + newPassword
     - Requires ADMIN role

   - **`apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/purchase-order.router.ts`** (READ — for Batch 3 proposal)
     - create: supplierId, orderDate, expectedDate, notes, items: [{productId, orderedQty, supplierCostSnapshot}]
     - updateStatus: id + status (ordered/partially_received/received/cancelled)
     - byId: includes supplier + items with product name/code
     - Requires ADMIN or PURCHASING_STAFF

   - **`apps/web/src/app/[tenantSlug]/products/page.tsx`** (READ — for Batch 3 proposal)
     - Searchable product list with pagination, links to detail pages
     - No create button yet — needs "+ New Product" form

   - **`apps/web/src/app/[tenantSlug]/products/[id]/page.tsx`** (READ — for Batch 3 proposal)
     - Product detail with card layout showing code, barcode, category, unit, quantity, threshold
     - No edit functionality yet — needs Edit button

   - **`apps/web/src/app/[tenantSlug]/users/page.tsx`** (READ — for Batch 3 proposal)
     - Basic list: name, email, role, status, lastLogin
     - No create/edit/deactivate — all needed

   - **`apps/web/src/app/[tenantSlug]/purchase-orders/page.tsx`** (READ — for Batch 3 proposal)
     - Basic list: PO number, supplier ID (raw, not name), date, status
     - No create form — needs full PO creation workflow

   - **`apps/web/src/components/barcode-scanner.tsx`** (READ from context — used by adjustments page)
     - Camera-based scanning via html5-qrcode + manual text input
     - Props: onScan, onError?, placeholder?

   - **`docs/IMPLEMENTATION_MAP.md`** (READ — to check current build state for Batch 3 proposal)

   - **`docs/CHANGELOG_AI.md`** (READ — to prepare governance update, 147 lines of existing entries)

4. Errors and fixes:
   - No errors encountered in this session. All three page rewrites compiled and built cleanly on first try.
   - `pnpm build` passed: "Tasks: 1 successful, 1 total" in 35.6s

5. Problem Solving:
   - Successfully implemented all 3 Batch 2 features by following the established patterns from Batch 1 (stock-in/stock-out pages)
   - Reused BarcodeScanner component pattern for the adjustments page product search
   - Handled nullable fields properly (empty string → null for tRPC mutations)
   - Added real-time validation feedback in adjustments form (negative stock warning)
   - Proposed Batch 3 by cross-referencing existing page states against available router mutations
